incident: Memory usage at 98% on production server, application crashing

analysis.summary: Production server memory usage exceeded threshold causing application crash
analysis.root_cause: Insufficient memory allocation for database queries
analysis.immediate_action: Increase production server RAM or reduce memory-intensive processes
additional_steps: Review database query optimization and indexing for performance improvement
Implement caching mechanisms to reduce database queries
Monitor system resource utilization and adjust thresholds as needed
analysis.prevention: Regularly review and optimize database queries, implement caching, and monitor system resources
